x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces DVS's open reference and de-identified service data (resource map, veteran-owned businesses, assistance requests, cases, aggregate client statistics) and adds make_referral — the net-new write workflow locked today inside the third-party VetConnectNYC portal (Combined Arms).

server.name: io.nyc.dvs
server.title: NYC Department of Veterans' Services (DVS)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Veterans' Services — the DVS Resource Map, NYC veteran-owned businesses, de-identified assistance requests, cases, and aggregate client demographics from NYC Open Data, plus the net-new ability to make and track a VetConnectNYC care-coordination referral (connect a veteran to services) that today lives only in the third-party Combined Arms portal.
server.instructions: Use find_veteran_resources / get_veteran_resource to locate veteran-serving resources in the DVS Resource Map by borough, service, or walk-in availability, and find_veteran_owned_businesses to search the veteran-owned business directory. find_assistance_requests, find_cases, and find_client_statistics answer analytics questions over DVS's de-identified service data — find_client_statistics returns AGGREGATE demographics only, never an identifiable veteran. make_referral (net-new) creates a VetConnectNYC care-coordination referral; it requires an authenticated user and mutates state — confirm the service needed, the veteran's borough/branch, and the details with the user before submitting, and set urgent=true for imminent homelessness, no food, or crisis so it escalates to a Veteran Resource Center instead of the standard 3-5 business-day queue.

tools.name: find_veteran_resources
tools.title: Find Veteran Resources
tools.description: Search the DVS Resource Map of veteran-serving resources and providers by borough, service, walk-in availability, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_veteran_resource
tools.title: Get Veteran Resource
tools.description: Fetch a single DVS Resource Map entry by its DVS_RES_ID.

tools.name: find_veteran_owned_businesses
tools.title: Find Veteran-Owned Businesses
tools.description: Search the NYC veteran-owned business directory by borough, service, certification, council district, or free text.

tools.name: find_assistance_requests
tools.title: Find Assistance Requests
tools.description: Search de-identified DVS assistance-request records (issue, engagement, referral-made-to, VetConnectNYC flag) by borough, fiscal year, issue, VetConnectNYC status, or branch. Never returns identifiable individuals.

tools.name: find_cases
tools.title: Find Cases
tools.description: Search de-identified DVS case records (service type, status, outcome) by service type, case status, or calendar year.

tools.name: find_client_statistics
tools.title: Find Client Statistics
tools.description: Return AGGREGATE / de-identified DVS client demographics (branch, service era, discharge type, race/ethnicity, gender, income band) by calendar year, branch, or service era. Never returns identifiable veterans.

tools.name: list_my_referrals
tools.title: List My Referrals
tools.description: List the authenticated veteran's own VetConnectNYC care-coordination referrals and their status — today visible only inside the Combined Arms portal.

tools.name: make_referral
tools.title: Make a Referral
tools.description: Create a VetConnectNYC care-coordination referral (connect a veteran to services). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the third-party Combined Arms 'Military Resource Portal' and a manual 3-5 business-day DVS Care Coordinator queue. Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm the service needed, the veteran's borough/branch, and the details first; set urgent=true for imminent homelessness, no food, or crisis.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.
